mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(S.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO) AS PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, TO_CHAR(S.PAY_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS PAY_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.SALARY_DISTIN_NO) AS SALARY_DISTIN_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(TO_CHAR(S.SALARY_DISTIN_NO), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SALARY_DISTIN_NAME, TO_CHAR(S.HR_START_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS HR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.HR_END_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS HR_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.AR_START_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS AR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.AR_END_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS AR_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.PA_OPEN_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS PA_OPEN_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.PA_TRANS_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS PA_TRANS_DATE, S.EMP_OPINION, TO_CHAR(S.ACTIVITY) AS ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(S.CREATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, S.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(S.UPDATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, S.UPDATED_BY FROM PA_PAY_SCHEDULE S WHERE S.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND S.ACTIVITY != 0
AND S.PAY_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.PAY_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND S.SALARY_DISTIN_NO = #{salaryDistinNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY S.PAY_DATE DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(S.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO) AS PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, TO_CHAR(S.PAY_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS PAY_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.SALARY_DISTIN_NO) AS SALARY_DISTIN_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(TO_CHAR(S.SALARY_DISTIN_NO), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SALARY_DISTIN_NAME, TO_CHAR(S.HR_START_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS HR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.HR_END_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS HR_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.AR_START_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS AR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.AR_END_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS AR_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.PA_OPEN_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS PA_OPEN_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.PA_TRANS_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY') AS PA_TRANS_DATE, S.EMP_OPINION, TO_CHAR(S.ACTIVITY) AS ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(S.CREATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, S.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(S.UPDATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, S.UPDATED_BY FROM PA_PAY_SCHEDULE S JOIN PA_WORK_FLOW W ON W.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = S.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO WHERE S.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND S.ACTIVITY != 0 AND W.PA_OPEN_FLAG = 1 ORDER BY S.PAY_DATE DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(S.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO) AS PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, TO_CHAR(S.PAY_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.SALARY_DISTIN_NO) AS SALARY_DISTIN_NO, TO_CHAR(S.HR_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS HR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.HR_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS HR_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.AR_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS AR_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.AR_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS AR_END_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.PA_OPEN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PA_OPEN_DATE, TO_CHAR(S.PA_TRANS_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PA_TRANS_DATE, S.EMP_OPINION, TO_CHAR(S.ACTIVITY) AS ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(S.CREATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS CREATE_DATE, S.CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(S.UPDATE_DATE, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, S.UPDATED_BY FROM PA_PAY_SCHEDULE S WHERE S.PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO PA_PAY_SCHEDULE ( PAY_SCHEDULE_NO, PAY_DATE, SALARY_DISTIN_NO, HR_START_DATE, HR_END_DATE, AR_START_DATE, AR_END_DATE, PA_OPEN_DATE, PA_TRANS_DATE, PA_LOCK_FLAG, AR_LOCK_FLAG, EMP_OPINION, ACTIVITY, CPNY_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_DATE(#{payDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
#{salaryDistinNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_DATE(#{hrStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{hrEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{arStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{arEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{paOpenDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{paTransDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
0, 0, #{empOpinion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_PAY_SCHEDULE SET PAY_DATE = TO_DATE(#{payDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , SALARY_DISTIN_NO = #{salaryDistinNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HR_START_DATE = TO_DATE(#{hrStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , HR_END_DATE = TO_DATE(#{hrEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , AR_START_DATE = TO_DATE(#{arStartDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , AR_END_DATE = TO_DATE(#{arEndDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , PA_OPEN_DATE = TO_DATE(#{paOpenDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , PA_TRANS_DATE = TO_DATE(#{paTransDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , EMP_OPINION = #{empOpinion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE PA_PAY_SCHEDULE SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PAY_SCHEDULE_NO = #{payScheduleNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
